title: File Handling
source_outline: Introduction to files: text vs binary files; absolute vs relative paths
File operations: open() and modes (r, w, a, r+); read, readline, readlines, write, close
Context managers: the with statement; automatic file closing
Reading CSVs: the csv module; reading rows
Working with JSON: json.load() and json.dump() (introduction)

next_assessment.title: Python Foundations Diagnostic
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can model data with classes, handle files and errors robustly, and maintain a professional Git portfolio - confirming readiness to begin the AI modules.
